message:
fix: resolve 9 clippy warnings in adaptive_radix and migration_config

- Allow large_enum_variant on ArtNode/Children (expected for adaptive radix tree)
- Collapse nested if-let into single expressions (collapsible_if)
- Replace drain(..).collect() with std::mem::take (drain_collect)
- Elide unnecessary lifetimes on children_get/children_get_mut
- Use unwrap_or_else instead of expect(&format!()) (expect_fun_call)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
